## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content creation, SEO audit results, and align on content review process for Clerk's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SSO Best Practices blog post nearly complete; delivery expected by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [SEO audit revealed minor issues (404 errors, thin content, duplicate titles) to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Content review process to involve broader Clerk team initially, then streamline over time](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Looker dashboard set up to track content performance, including GrowthX vs. Clerk-authored content](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Progress

  - [SSO Best Practices blog post chosen as first piece, focusing on indie hackers/solo coders](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Blog post delivery expected by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Alex to review Airtable for additional blog ideas, approving or rejecting as needed](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [GrowthX to double-check for content overlap before proceeding with approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Mid-funnel content approach for SSO Best Practices blog](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [2-3 mentions of Clerk planned, focusing on depth rather than frequency](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Enterprise SSO to be omitted from this piece](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [SEO best practices (e.g., H2s as questions) to be implemented in content](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### SEO Audit Results

  - [Main issue: Adding nofollow to footer link causing 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Thin content on changelog pages receiving backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Some duplicate title tags identified](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Broken links found on a few pages](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Overall, fewer issues than typically seen on other websites](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Content Review and Publishing Process

  - [Initial drafts to be stored in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Alex to set up shared folder with global access for Clerk team](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Content to be posted in team channel for broader review initially](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Plan to streamline review process over time as team becomes comfortable with quality](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker dashboard set up, integrating Google Search Console and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Dashboard includes non-branded traffic, GrowthX content performance, and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Airtable integration used to differentiate GrowthX vs. Clerk-authored content](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Publication Strategy

  - [Initial blog posts to be unlisted but indexable/crawlable](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Approach aims to ensure quality meets Clerk's high standards before full public release](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Internal linking to be implemented for crawler discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to review and approve/reject additional blog ideas in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver SSO Best Practices blog post by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Alex to set up shared Google Drive folder for content drafts and grant necessary permissions](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with artifact length and adjust based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Alex to address SEO audit findings with team member Isaac](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Implement unlisted but indexable strategy for initial blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TMzi4F_Jmh6E7ccigaQGAECE4ytyARo8?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
